heading: Use of funds appropriated under section 5108
label: 5106 Use of funds appropriated under section 5108
text: For the purpose of carrying into effect the land-purchase provision of this Act, the Secretary of the Interior is authorized to use so much as may be necessary of any funds heretofore or hereafter appropriated pursuant to .section 5108 of this title
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to sections 5104 to 5106 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Aug. 10, 1939, ch. 66253 Stat. 1351
CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 463g of this title
